name: Vanda Pharmaceuticals Inc.
summary: Vanda Pharmaceuticals Inc. is a global biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing innovative therapies for high unmet medical needs. Its commercial products include Fanapt (iloperidone) for schizophrenia and bipolar I disorder, HETLIOZ (tasimelteon) for Non-24-Hour Sleep-Wake Disorder and Smith-Magenis syndrome, PONVORY (ponesimod) for relapsing forms of multiple sclerosis, and NEREUS (tradipitant) for prevention of vomiting induced by motion. The company also has pipeline candidates including Bysanti (milsaperidone) and imsidolimab.
